sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id INTEGER, arr1 FLOAT[], arr2 FLOAT[]);
INSERT INTO test_arrays (id, arr1, arr2) VALUES (1, array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT), array_value(2.0::FLOAT, 3.0::FLOAT, 4.0::FLOAT));
INSERT INTO test_arrays (id, arr1, arr2) VALUES (2, array_value(4.0::FLOAT, 5.0::FLOAT), array_value(6.0::FLOAT, 7.0::FLOAT));
SELECT id, array_negative_inner_product(arr1, arr2) AS negative_inner_product FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_arrays SET arr2 = array_value(1.0::FLOAT, 1.0::FLOAT, 1.0::FLOAT) WHERE id = 2;
